intro: There is no information available on Goeppertia fragilis, but I found Goeppertia fragilis is actually a synonym for the plant Calathea fragilis (syn. Calathea fragilis, a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage.
